title: tragopogon brevirostris subsp. volgensis
intro: Tragopogon brevirostris subsp. volgensis, also known as the salsify or goat's beard, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Tragopogon brevirostris subsp. volgensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be limited to controlled amounts and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
